skill: One-variable data: Distributions and measures of center and spread
stem:
The table shows the frequency of values in a data set.

ValueFrequency
42
75
93
111

What is the mode of the data set?
rationale: The correct answer is 7. The mode is the value with the highest frequency. The value 7 appears 5 times, which is more than any other value, so the mode is 7.
